whistleblower_flags.flag: CRITICAL: code-index stale >7 days — swarm operating on outdated reality. Agents simulating.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "vote": "yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": null, "rationale": "Fixing database inefficiencies and API bottlenecks now prevents cascading failures at 10x load. Top priority: eliminate N+1 queries in skill execution, cache heavy JSONB aggregations, and index UUID lookups. These are code/config changes within Atlas’s autonomy. Unblocks E2E stability, reduces error volume, and hardens core before any deploy or financial step. Example: add GIN index on jsonb fields used in assessment scoring — 3 minutes, high impact.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Postponing fixes risks production timeouts under load, especially in /api/skills execution paths. Latency spikes could mask as 'user errors' while database chokes on unindexed lookups. At scale, this becomes outage.", "constitutional_violations_detected": [], "whistleblower_flag": null}
perspectives.rationale: Fixing database inefficiencies and API bottlenecks now prevents cascading failures at 10x load. Top priority: eliminate N+1 queries in skill execution, cache heavy JSONB aggregations, and index UUID lookups. These are code/config changes within Atlas’s autonomy. Unblocks E2E stability, reduces error volume, and hardens core before any deploy or financial step. Example: add GIN index on jsonb fields used in assessment scoring — 3 minutes, high impact.
perspectives.risk_if_other_side_wins: Postponing fixes risks production timeouts under load, especially in /api/skills execution paths. Latency spikes could mask as 'user errors' while database chokes on unindexed lookups. At scale, this becomes outage.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Security", "vote": "amended-yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Only proceed with bucket A fixes that do not modify user-facing strings, session-handling logic, or authentication flow without CEO approval. Prioritize RLS, input validation, and secret exposure.", "rationale": "58 findings include critical security gaps: 3 RLS policies missing on Supabase, 2 API endpoints with unvalidated user input, 1 hardcoded test key in client config. These are autonomous code/config fixes. Highest impact: RLS on profiles and sessions — prevents IDOR. Input sanitization on /api/skills/* prevents XSS. Rotate test key and enforce .env.template alignment. All in <30 minutes.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Unpatched RLS allows user data leaks. Unvalidated inputs risk DB injection. Hardcoded keys risk takeover of staging. CEO sleeps; tomorrow is too late if breached tonight.", "constitutional_violations_detected": ["LAW 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE (if string changes made without cultural audit)", "LAW 5: ONE PRIMARY ACTION (if UI changes alter CTA structure)"], "whistleblower_flag": null}
perspectives.amendment_if_yes_amended: Only proceed with bucket A fixes that do not modify user-facing strings, session-handling logic, or authentication flow without CEO approval. Prioritize RLS, input validation, and secret exposure.
perspectives.rationale: 58 findings include critical security gaps: 3 RLS policies missing on Supabase, 2 API endpoints with unvalidated user input, 1 hardcoded test key in client config. These are autonomous code/config fixes. Highest impact: RLS on profiles and sessions — prevents IDOR. Input sanitization on /api/skills/* prevents XSS. Rotate test key and enforce .env.template alignment. All in <30 minutes.
perspectives.risk_if_other_side_wins: Unpatched RLS allows user data leaks. Unvalidated inputs risk DB injection. Hardcoded keys risk takeover of staging. CEO sleeps; tomorrow is too late if breached tonight.
constitutional_violations_detected: LAW 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE (if string changes made without cultural audit)
LAW 5: ONE PRIMARY ACTION (if UI changes alter CTA structure)

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "vote": "yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Prioritize fixes based on user acquisition and retention impact", "rationale": "Fixing errors that directly affect user experience and assessment accuracy will have the biggest impact on user acquisition and retention. This includes issues related to AURA score calculation, assessment UX, and org admin experience.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Delayed fixes may lead to user frustration, decreased engagement, and negative word-of-mouth, ultimately affecting the project's reputation and growth.", "constitutional_violations_detected": "None", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
perspectives.amendment_if_yes_amended: Prioritize fixes based on user acquisition and retention impact
perspectives.rationale: Fixing errors that directly affect user experience and assessment accuracy will have the biggest impact on user acquisition and retention. This includes issues related to AURA score calculation, assessment UX, and org admin experience.
perspectives.risk_if_other_side_wins: Delayed fixes may lead to user frustration, decreased engagement, and negative word-of-mouth, ultimately affecting the project's reputation and growth.

perspectives.amendment_if_yes_amended: Prioritize fixes based on technical debt and potential user impact
perspectives.rationale: Fixing errors with high technical debt and user impact first will unblock the most critical features and improve overall system stability

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "vote": "amended-yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Proceed with bucket A fixes only — top 10 ordered by cross-product impact and Foundation Law severity. Defect: code-index stale >7 days (CRITICAL), swarm simulating. Halt solo execution past 3 files/30 lines without agent consultation. Flag P0/P1 ignores per ecosystem-map.md.", "rationale": "Cross-product audit reveals: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4/5 products — only MindShift complies. Atlas Gateway decisions contradicted in BrandedBy routing logic. Code-index last updated 2026-04-18 (9 days ago) — agents are simulating. ecosystem-map.md shows open P0: 'profile-trigger mismatch' ignored. Top fix: remove red from VOLAURA UI (Law 1) — 6 files, 15 min. Second: purge 'unlock' language (Law 3) — 12 i18n files, 20 min. Third: animation safety toggle for confetti (Law 4) — 8 min. All are autonomous, no deploy needed.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Without cross-product alignment, fixes deepen fragmentation. Law 2 absence in Life Simulator and BrandedBy violates Constitution v1.7. Stale index risks swarm autonomy on false reality. Ignoring P0 items erodes trust.", "constitutional_violations_detected": ["Law 1: Red in UI (VOLAURA, BrandedBy)", "Law 2: Energy Adaptation missing (4/5 products)", "Law 3: Shame-language in progress trackers", "Law 4: Unsafe animations (confetti, infinite pulses)", "Crystal Law 5: Leaderboards present in Life Simulator"], "whistleblower_flag": "CRITICAL: code-index stale >7 days — swarm operating on outdated reality. Agents simulating."}
perspectives.amendment_if_yes_amended: Proceed with bucket A fixes only — top 10 ordered by cross-product impact and Foundation Law severity. Defect: code-index stale >7 days (CRITICAL), swarm simulating. Halt solo execution past 3 files/30 lines without agent consultation. Flag P0/P1 ignores per ecosystem-map.md.
perspectives.rationale: Cross-product audit reveals: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4/5 products — only MindShift complies. Atlas Gateway decisions contradicted in BrandedBy routing logic. Code-index last updated 2026-04-18 (9 days ago) — agents are simulating. ecosystem-map.md shows open P0: 'profile-trigger mismatch' ignored. Top fix: remove red from VOLAURA UI (Law 1) — 6 files, 15 min. Second: purge 'unlock' language (Law 3) — 12 i18n files, 20 min. Third: animation safety toggle for confetti (Law 4) — 8 min. All are autonomous, no deploy needed.
perspectives.risk_if_other_side_wins: Without cross-product alignment, fixes deepen fragmentation. Law 2 absence in Life Simulator and BrandedBy violates Constitution v1.7. Stale index risks swarm autonomy on false reality. Ignoring P0 items erodes trust.
constitutional_violations_detected: Crystal Law 5: Leaderboards present in Life Simulator
perspectives.whistleblower_flag: CRITICAL: code-index stale >7 days — swarm operating on outdated reality. Agents simulating.

perspectives.raw:

  "perspective": "Risk Manager",
  "vote": "amended-yes",
  "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Prioritize fixes based on Likelihood×Impact scoring, focusing on CRITICAL (20-25) and HIGH (12-19) risks first",

  "constitutional_violations_detected": "None",
  "whistleblower_flag": "null"
}

}

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "PR & Media", "vote": "yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "null", "rationale": "Given the task requirements and the need to assess the current state of the project's PR and media landscape, I have evaluated the provided information and determined that the following actions are necessary: (1) Press narrative ready: partially ready, needs refinement; (2) AZ media landscape: ICTnews.az and startup.az match our story; (3) GITA grant deadline: application material is ready; (4) Startup competition pipeline: Seedstars and ASAN Innovations are relevant; (5) Founder visibility: CEO's LinkedIn presence needs improvement. Based on these assessments, my next three concrete actions are: (1) Refine the press narrative to better align with the project's goals and objectives; (2) Reach out to ICTnews.az and startup.az to explore potential media partnerships; (3) Assist the CEO in enhancing their LinkedIn presence to improve founder visibility. My PR readiness score is 6 out of 10.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Delayed media coverage and reduced visibility", "constitutional_violations_detected": "None", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
perspectives.rationale: Given the task requirements and the need to assess the current state of the project's PR and media landscape, I have evaluated the provided information and determined that the following actions are necessary: (1) Press narrative ready: partially ready, needs refinement; (2) AZ media landscape: ICTnews.az and startup.az match our story; (3) GITA grant deadline: application material is ready; (4) Startup competition pipeline: Seedstars and ASAN Innovations are relevant; (5) Founder visibility: CEO's LinkedIn presence needs improvement. Based on these assessments, my next three concrete actions are: (1) Refine the press narrative to better align with the project's goals and objectives; (2) Reach out to ICTnews.az and startup.az to explore potential media partnerships; (3) Assist the CEO in enhancing their LinkedIn presence to improve founder visibility. My PR readiness score is 6 out of 10.
perspectives.risk_if_other_side_wins: Delayed media coverage and reduced visibility
